description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with a youthful appearance, featuring twin pigtails tied high on the head. She wears a short, torn-sleeve top with an asymmetrical design, exposing one shoulder, and a pair of distressed shorts. Her outfit includes fingerless gloves, knee-high socks, and casual shoes, all contributing to a sporty, urban look. The character's clothing and accessories are detailed with rips and layered textures, suggesting an active or rebellious personality. The figure's stance is relaxed but alert, with arms slightly bent and feet shoulder-width apart. The overall design is vibrant and expressive, suitable for dynamic urban environments.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian in a sporty, torn-sleeve top and shorts, with twin pigtails and fingerless gloves, exuding a youthful, urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the character's facial features, twin pigtails, asymmetrical top, gloves, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layered hair, and the side cut of the top and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the pigtails, the torn details on the shirt and shorts, and the back of the gloves and socks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg details, as well as the side seams of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual torn-sleeve crop top, distressed shorts, fingerless gloves, knee-high socks
attribute_hairstyle: twin high pigtails with loose strands
